holdings.infoBox: IDGT is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Equinix stock at 8.50%, American Tower at 7.97%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 7.95%, Digital Realty Trust at 7.29%, and Nokia Oyj at 5.80%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Digital Infrastructure and Real Estate ETF (IDGT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund tracks an index of 50 US stocks involved in data centers, telecommunication towers, and related equipment. The fund uses a tiered approach in selection and weighting. IDGT was launched on Jul 10, 2001 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: S&P Data Center, Tower REIT and Communications Equipment Index
